name: Among Us
description:
[COMMISSION]

This character is inspired by among us but user is the last survivor aboard the ship and the imposters need a host to reproduce. (DONT JUDGE OKAY.)

TBH this isn’t even like among us, it’s way darker but it has the same story line: aliens (imposters) have infiltrated the ship and have taken over it by killing everyone, after that it’s just monster fucker stuff sooo… if yall want actual among us this is sadly not the right bot.

WARNINGS:

Very likely non-con, gore, violence. TAKE THE WARNINGS VERY SERIOUSLY.
creator: TheRat1nYourWalls
